chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-3866 of 2016 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) For order as to non-prosecution of CMA No.4382/2025 (Restoration) 09.09.2025 Mr. Azhar Habib, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Sanaullah Noor Ghouri, advocate for the respondent Ms. Wajiha M. Mehdi, Assistant Attorney General --------- Learned counsel for the petitioner has filed restoration application as this petition was dismissed for non-prosecution vide order dated 11.02.2025, which is set out for ease of reference below: “This is an old matter of year 2016 filed 09 years ago. On the last date of hearing, none for the petitioner was present without intimation. Same is the position today. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this petition, which is dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith all pending application(s).” Thereafter, the urgent application was dismissed and restoration application was deferred on 28.02.2025, however, none was present for the petitioner without intimation which shows that the petitioner has lack of genuine interest to pursue this petition. We find no grounds in application for restoration of this petition which was filed in 2016 in light of the reasons given in order dated 11.02.2025 which is reproduced above. Accordingly, the restoration application is dismissed. Head of Const. Benches Judge Nadir*
